description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build XPTools that triggers on push to branches matching 'xpt_*_release'. The workflow has read permissions to repository contents and consists of four jobs: build-windows, build-mac, build-linux, and make-zips. The build jobs checkout the repository, set up the environment, and build the project for their respective platforms. The make-zips job depends on the build jobs, downloads the build artifacts, creates zip files for each platform, and archives them.
